sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الدُّوَلُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ كَثِيرًا بِالِابْتِكَارِ وَالتَّكْنُولُوجْيَا الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske zemlje se mnogo zanimaju za inovacije i modernu tehnologiju.
sentences.translationEn: Arab countries are very interested in innovation and modern technology.

sentences.arabic: بَنَتْ بَعْضُ الْمُدُنِ مَرَاكِزَ تِقْنِيَّةً لِدَعْمِ الشَّبَابِ الْمُبْدِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Neki gradovi su izgradili tehničke centre za podršku kreativnim mladim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Some cities have built technical centers to support creative young people.

sentences.arabic: نَشَاهِدُ الْآنَ مَشَارِيعَ رَقْمِيَّةً نَاجِحَةً فِي مَجَالَاتٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada vidimo uspješne digitalne projekte u različitim oblastima.
sentences.translationEn: We are now seeing successful digital projects in various fields.
